steps: The D&D 2024 character builder has four skills: dnd-build (guided level-1 character creation), dnd-check (validate a character sheet for rules legality), dnd-lookup (look up any spell, feat, or class rule from the catalogue with source citation), and dnd-help (this skill — explains the system and routes your request).
All values come exclusively from the bundled data catalogue — training memory is never trusted. Every answer cites its source.
